sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Detroit</city> <country>United States</country> <description>accumsan tellus nisi eu orci mauris lacinia sapien quis libero nullam sit amet turpis elementum ligula vehicula consequat morbi a</description> <end_date/> <make>Dodge</make> <model>Ram 1500</model> <pin>9632</pin> <start_date>2021-07-29</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 04:57:53</sys_created_on> <sys_id>542547a6fd4b32107f44b9211467fe98</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 04:57:53</sys_updated_on> <vin>1GTN1TEX1DZ268860</vin> <year>2021</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
